hotel.name: Chalicha Resort
hotel.description: One of the most popular resorts near Hat Thung Wua Laen, particularly among Thai domestic travelers and divers returning from Koh Tao. Set in a pleasant garden 200 meters from the beach with a swimming pool, bungalow-style rooms, and an attentive family-run service. The resort can arrange transport to the Lomprayah pier for early morning ferry departures. Good value compared to similar properties in Koh Samui.
highlights: Swimming pool in a quiet garden setting
Arranges ferry pickups and island diving trips

similarHotels.name: Tanisa Resort
similarHotels.description: A popular mid-range resort in a garden setting close to Hat Thung Wua Laen beach, with bungalow-style accommodation and a swimming pool. The resort is quiet and well-maintained with larger rooms than most Chumphon properties at this price. Good base for diving at Chumphon Pinnacle — the resort can arrange day trips. Popular with Thai weekend visitors and international travelers heading to or from Koh Tao.
highlights: Swimming pool in a lush garden setting
15-minute walk to Hat Thung Wua Laen beach
Can arrange diving and island day trips

similarHotels.name: A-Te Chumphon Hotel
similarHotels.description: A polished mid-range hotel in central Chumphon town, one of the most comfortable options within the town center. Modern rooms with AC, reliable WiFi, minibar, and a rooftop area. The hotel is a short walk from the night market and has a tour desk that arranges ferry tickets, motorbike rentals, and island day trips. Consistently good reviews for cleanliness and service among mid-range Chumphon options.
highlights: Modern rooms with clean bathrooms and reliable WiFi
Central location — walking distance to night market and Lomprayah office
Tour desk arranges ferry tickets, island trips, and motorbike rentals

similarHotels.name: Chumphon Cabana Resort & Dive Center
similarHotels.description: The most established dive resort at Hat Thung Wua Laen beach, combining comfortable beach accommodation with a PADI-certified dive center. Beachfront bungalows and garden rooms spread across a well-maintained property. The on-site dive center runs daily trips to Chumphon Pinnacle, Ko Ngam, Ko Talu, and Koh Tao. Ideal for dedicated divers who want to maximize in-water time without boat commuting.
highlights: PADI dive center on-site — dive the Pinnacle directly from the resort
Direct beach access on Hat Thung Wua Laen
Combo dive-and-stay packages available at competitive rates

paaQuestions: Is it worth staying in Chumphon?
Is it worth going all inclusive in Thailand?

aiContent.hookIntro: Booking Chalicha Resort without knowing it's 200 meters from the beach can leave you trudging through a garden path in the midday heat.
aiContent.intro: Chalicha Resort offers bungalow-style rooms in a quiet garden setting with a swimming pool and family-run service, ideal for a relaxed stopover. It's best suited for couples, families, and divers needing easy ferry arrangements to Koh Tao.
whyBook: Swimming pool in peaceful garden for unwinding after dives.
Family-run service provides personalized attention to guests.
Arranges transport to Lomprayah pier for early ferries.
Bungalow rooms offer cozy stays at good value versus Koh Samui.
whyNotBook: 200-meter walk to beach requires effort in hot weather.
Garden location feels isolated without on-site beach access.
Limited amenities beyond pool may bore longer stays.
Family-run setup means fewer staff during peak times.
No direct beachfront views from most bungalows.
aiContent.skipIf: Skip if you prioritize direct beachfront access over a garden retreat.
aiContent.detailedReview: Checking into Chalicha Resort feels welcoming, with the family owners often greeting arrivals personally and offering cold drinks while handling the quick process. The bungalow-style rooms are simple yet comfortable, featuring air-conditioned spaces with basic furnishings that suit short stays for divers or families—think wooden accents and private patios opening to the garden. The standout amenity is the swimming pool nestled in the quiet garden, providing a serene spot to cool off after a day at Hat Thung Wua Laen beach, just a short walk away. Food quality is straightforward; the on-site restaurant serves Thai dishes and simple Western options, with portions that satisfy but lack variety for extended visits—guests often praise the fresh seafood but note repetitive menus. Service shines through the attentive, family-run management, where staff remember preferences and assist with booking diving trips or ferry pickups to the Lomprayah pier. Typical guests are Thai domestic travelers, couples seeking tranquility, and divers stopping over en route to Koh Tao, creating a laid-back vibe without rowdy crowds. Overall, it's a practical choice for value-driven comfort in Chumphon, though the 200-meter beach distance means planning for that stroll.
aiContent.locationReality: Chalicha Resort sits in a pleasant garden 200 meters from Hat Thung Wua Laen beach, about a 3-minute walk through shaded paths. The area is quiet and beach-focused, with the Lomprayah pier roughly 10-15 minutes by arranged transport for ferries to Koh Tao. Central Chumphon town requires a 20-30 minute drive, making it less ideal for urban exploration without a scooter or taxi.
localSignals: 200 meters (3-minute walk) to Hat Thung Wua Laen beach.
Arranges transport to Lomprayah pier for ferry departures.
Garden setting 10-15 minutes from dive sites by transport.
Near Thai domestic traveler spots, no nearby 7-Eleven mentioned.
aiContent.travellerNote: Guests often praise the personalized family service and quiet garden pool but note the walk to the beach can feel inconvenient in heat.
bookingTips: Request bungalows facing the garden for quieter stays away from paths.
Check Agoda for cheaper rates than Booking.com in Thailand off-season.
Prices spike December-February for high season diver traffic.
Verify ferry pickup availability when booking for early Koh Tao departures.
Confirm breakfast inclusion as it's not always standard in mid-range.

similarHotels.name: Tanisa Resort
similarHotels.howDifferent: Similar garden bungalows and pool but slightly cheaper at 1,200-2,000 THB with closer beach proximity.

similarHotels.name: Chumphon Cabana Resort & Dive Center
similarHotels.howDifferent: More established with PADI dive center directly on Hat Thung Wua Laen beach, pricier at 2,000-3,500 THB.

similarHotels.name: A-Te Chumphon Hotel
similarHotels.howDifferent: Central town location with modern AC rooms, no pool or beach access but convenient for non-coastal stays.

faq.a: Chalicha Resort is located in Hat Thung Wua Laen area of Chumphon, 200 meters from the beach in a quiet garden setting.

faq.q: Is it worth staying in Chumphon?
faq.a: Yes, for divers and ferry stopovers to Koh Tao, as Chumphon offers affordable beach access and transport hubs without Koh Samui crowds.
For beach vibes, choose Hat Thung Wua Laen resorts like Chalicha; for town convenience, opt for central spots like A-Te Chumphon Hotel.

faq.q: Is it worth going all inclusive in Thailand?
faq.a: Not typically in mid-range spots like Chalicha, where meals are affordable separately; all-inclusive suits luxury islands more than Chumphon stopovers.

faq.q: What are the best hotels near Hat Thung Wua Laen?
faq.a: Chalicha Resort stands out for its garden pool and ferry service; alternatives include Tanisa for budget bungalows or Cabana for diving focus.

faq.q: How far is Chalicha Resort from the beach?
faq.a: It's 200 meters away, a quick 3-minute walk through the garden to Hat Thung Wua Laen.

aiContent.urgencyLine: Garden bungalows at Chalicha Resort book out 1-2 months ahead for December-February diver season—check availability today.
aiContent.methodology: We rated Chalicha Resort based on guest reviews, amenities, location, and value from sources like TripAdvisor. We weighted service and transport arrangements highest because they suit its stopover niche for divers. Prices and availability change—always verify before booking. Last updated: 2026-04.
aiContent.metaDescription: Chalicha Resort in Chumphon delivers quiet garden bungalows with a pool and ferry service for divers and families (4.2/5). Note the 200m beach walk in heat. Book for value stopover near Hat Thung Wua Laen—check rates now. (148 characters)
